summary: Automated summary/data-table helper coverage and row-level iOS/Android support captures exist, but manual VoiceOver and TalkBack screen-reader review has not been completed.

completedEntries.notes: Automated summary/data-table helpers, showcase data-details coverage, and native QA checklist synchronization passed; native VoiceOver and TalkBack review remains required.

Representative iOS VoiceOver-target and Android TalkBack-target screenshots/logs are captured for every accessibility matrix row, including Android UI hierarchy XML snapshots. These are supporting artifacts only; manual screen-reader review remains required before any row can pass.

requiredAssistiveTech.build: Expo showcase or native release app
Expo showcase or native release app
